---
title: "Teaching"
---

:::{.margin-top:1.5cm}

💰 **FINE 451** - Fixed Income Analysis (Bachelor)

💵 **FINE 710** - Fixed Income Analysis (Ph.D.)

🖥️ **FINE 460** - Financial Analytics: Machine Learning and Econometrics for business students

🐍 <a href="papers/Python Slides.zip">**Python workshop**</a> for Masters in Finance students
:::
